case_title: WALL MEDICAL GROUP VS VERASAKDI, SAE-UNG

docket_entries.description: SUBSTITUTED PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT VERASAKDI, SAE-UNG
INFO MAILED TO PLTF. CANNOT FILE DISMISSAL- JUDGMENT HAS BEEN ENTERED
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $352.14 FILED BY WALL MEDICAL GROUP AS TO DEFENDANT VERASAKDI, SAE-UNG ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR FEB-22-1999 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF WALL MEDICAL GROUP IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT VERASAKDI, SAE-UNG PLAINTIFF STATED THAT DEFENDANT PAID THE PRINCIPAL AMOUNT. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
